---
title: "The Rev. Alfred Gurney"
---

## The Rev. Alfred Gurney

**Dates:** (1843-1898)

### Description

Vicar of St. Barnabas, Pimlico, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1885-93)

### Biography

He was author of hymns, religious works and a study of D.G. Rossetti; he married (1866) Alice Blanche Gibbs, daughter of William Gibbs of Tyntesfield. [LG 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from March 24th 1874

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
